prose: The frontier orbitals task on benzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The geometry was obtained from the specified xyz file. The SCF converged successfully in 8 cycles. The HOMO-LUMO gap computed is exactly 6.6310857 eV, which is reported with the specified precision.
